parameters.name: convert
parameters.label: Convert Input
parameters.description: This menu determines the method to convert inputs to binary:

parameters.name: preop
parameters.label: Channel Pre OP
parameters.description: Once converted by the Convert Input stage, Channel Pre OP defines a unary operation on each input sample:

parameters.name: chanop
parameters.label: Combine Channels
parameters.description: Takes the first input and combines its channels, then the second input and combines its channels, and so on.

parameters.name: chopop
parameters.label: Combine CHOPs
parameters.description: Combine CHOPs combines the first channels of each , the second channels of each , etc.. Channels between inputs can be combined by number or name. Combining (Logic) Operations are:

parameters.name: match
parameters.label: Match by
parameters.description: Channels are matched between inputs by Channel Name or Channel Number.

parameters.name: align
parameters.label: Align
parameters.description: Inputs that don't start at the same frame can be aligned. Se the section, Align Options.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: boundmax
parameters.label: Boundmax
parameters.description: Set lower and upper bounds for when Convert Input is set to Off When Outside Bounds.
